description:
![Image](http://4.bp.blogspot.com/-qN4al_K83Xo/TbsQND3P93I/AAAAAAAAAHI/CbKAsaZM7cs/s320/RJ076865_img_main.jpg)

<http://www.megaupload.com/?d=8IXNI1SL>  
Story  
Hayashigakure City, a city in the mountains, has been performing a dark ceremony for more than a thousand years.  
To appease the wrath of an angry god, the men would gather to engage in group sex with a woman designated as a shrine maiden;  
if the girl becomes pregnant, then the god shall be appeased and bless the village with peace and a good harvest.  
If she does not, she would be wrapped in straw soaked in the semen and thrown into the river alive to become a sacrifice to the god.  
In the present, the ceremony has not been forgotten to the depths of history...  
The depraved and wretched ceremony continues by the hand of a secret organization, the Group Sex Club, active in the unique school in Higashigakure City.  
  
Motoko Tamura, the protagonist, starts her work as the leader of the Group Sex Club!  
  
Netorare Gangbang Animation!  
The staffs of Space Bandit Sarah series once again gathered for the animation project of another popular game by Lilith, The Group Sex Club!  
The director Yanaha Sadayama presents an amazingly grisly girlfriend-stealing story backed by the black convention!  
  
The First Episode: Suzuko and Aiko  
The targeted girls of the first episode are:  
Suzuko Yamasaki, a vengeful revenge teacher, whose mother has been chosen as the sacrifice in the past, and  
Aiko Katsuragi, a beautiful female doctor who works in the unique clinic of the city.  
In the repeated lustful gangbang, their pride as a teacher and dignity as a mother and a wife, are slowly destructed insidiously...  
  
Cast  
Suzuko Yamasaki: Hina Nakase  
Tamura Motoko: Mari Oda  
Aiko Katsuragi: Miyabi Shien  
Maki Katsuragi: Junko Kusayanagi  
Shiori Nakamura: Kotone Hirokawa  
Tomomi Yamanaka: Ryuu Andou  
  
Staff  
Plan: Ittohsai Sasayama  
Producer: Taku Horie, Ittohsai Sasayama  
Composition of the series: Udatan  
Script: Konutan  
Storyboard, Animation Director: Yanaha Sadayama  
Character setting: Kohaku Sumeragi  
Character design: Yanaha Sadayama  
Art Director: Katahira Shinji  
Photography Director: Kazuhito Horikawa  
Sound Director: Manten Kurisu  
Animation Production: Seven  
Production: PIXY  
  
\*Total runtime: 27 minutes  
  
\*Picture size: 16:9 letterbox.  
  
\*Watchable with Windows Media Player.  
  
For more details please visit:[http://www.pixy-soft.com/product/product16\_01.html](http://anonym.to/?http://www.pixy-soft.com/product/product16_01.html)
